goal: Ship a validated, evidence-based trading signal system by May 2026 that, once live, maximizes profit at the lowest operating cost by dynamically shifting strategy to whichever candidate is currently earning the most.

verification.command: python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('.claude/settings.json')); assert 'TaskCompleted' in s['hooks']; assert 'Stop' in s['hooks']; assert len(s.get('permissions',{}).get('allow',[])) >= 5; print('PASS')"

steps.name: Switch Paper Trading Analysis from Gemini to Claude

verification.command: source .venv/bin/activate && python scripts/audit/mcp_inventory.py --json > handoff/mcp_inventory.json && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('handoff/mcp_inventory.json')); assert d['servers'], d"

python scripts/audit/mcp_registry_pull.py --output handoff/mcp_candidates.csv && python -c "import csv; rows=list(csv.DictReader(open('handoff/mcp_candidates.csv'))); assert len(rows) >= 20, len(rows)"
python scripts/audit/mcp_risk_score.py && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('handoff/mcp_risk_scores.json')); assert all('risk_band' in v for v in d.values())"
python scripts/harness/mcp_ab_test.py --server alpaca --samples 20 && python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('handoff/mcp_ab_test_alpaca.json')); assert d['parity_rate'] >= 0.95"

steps.name: MCP servers respond to ping + list_tools

success_criteria: all three servers respond to JSON-RPC ping
list_tools returns at least one tool per server

verification.command: curl -sf -m 60 http://127.0.0.1:8765/api/signals/AAPL | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); keys=['insider','options','social_sentiment','patent','earnings_tone','fred_macro','alt_data','sector','nlp_sentiment','anomalies','monte_carlo','quant_model']; miss=[k for k in keys if k not in d]; print('SIGNALS_OK' if not miss else f'MISSING:{miss}'); sys.exit(0 if not miss else 1)"
success_criteria: at least 8 of 12 return non-ERROR payload
no Type error lines in last 200 lines
each tab label text present in rendered HTML
no TypeError or ReferenceError in console logs
no rose-500 error banner element in DOM
conversations.history lookup returns the posted message

steps.name: Watchdog alert fires on simulated process kill
Append harness log row + clean shutdown

success_criteria: new row contains phase=4.6 and result field
no uvicorn process bound to 8765 after exit
no stray mcp_server PIDs vs pre-test snapshot
stdout contains JSON with >= 12 provider keys
no secrets or API keys appear in stdout
every provider has cost, freshness, coverage, spof, license fields

success_criteria: >= 10 full reads flagged with 'FULL READ' tag
each gap has data_class, current_provider_or_null, severity
every entry has vendor, fallback, cost_usd_month, effort_days, alpha_tier, license_note

gate.reason: Go-live blocked until every other phase (2, 3, 4.5, 4.6, 5, 5.5, 6, 7, 8, 9) reaches status=done and phase-4 step 4.9 (aggregate smoketest) passes. 'Test everything' is a hard gate: a single failing prior-phase verification command blocks capital.
